response.reasoning: Bogdan has over 12 years of full-stack experience, far exceeding the 6+ year requirement, with consistent work in TypeScript, Node.js, React, and cloud platforms like AWS. He has direct experience with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks at re:cinq, matching a key required skill. His work with Vitest-equivalent testing (TDD, CI/CD, custom test runners) and containerization (Docker, Kubernetes) aligns well. He has used PostgreSQL/MySQL/MongoDB, Git, and multiple languages including Java and Kotlin-adjacent DLang. His open-source contributions and workshops demonstrate strong communication, documentation, and process improvement skills. His MIT degree satisfies the education requirement. Minor gaps: no explicit mention of Nest.js or Vitest by name, and German is only basic — though not critical for an engineering role. His current role at re:cinq is recent and ongoing, suggesting stability.
strengths: 12+ years of full-stack experience with deep expertise in TypeScript, Node.js, and React
Proven AI-agent infrastructure experience and contribution to agentic workflows
Strong DevOps and process advocacy (Docker, Kubernetes, CI/CD, TDD, code reviews)
concerns: No explicit mention of Nest.js or Vitest in resume — though Node.js and testing frameworks are present
German language proficiency is only basic, may limit collaboration in Berlin-based teams
Extensive open-source and freelance history may raise questions about focus or project continuity
response.justification: Bogdan exceeds the core requirements with deep full-stack experience, strong cloud and DevOps skills, and rare AI-agent exposure — a standout for this role. His MIT background, open-source leadership, and testing rigor further validate his engineering maturity. The absence of Nest.js and Vitest by name is a minor gap, easily bridged given his strong Node.js and testing foundation. His basic German is a low-risk limitation in an engineering context.
